# zohomail_domain_subdomain_stripping (Resource)

Enable subdomain stripping for a Zoho Mail domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zohomail_domain" "example" {
  domain_name = "example.com"
}

resource "zohomail_domain_subdomain_stripping" "example" {
  domain_name = zohomail_domain.example.domain_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain_name` (String) Zoho Mail domain name.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether subdomain stripping is enabled in Zoho Mail.
- `id` (String) Subdomain stripping resource identifier. Equal to `domain_name`.
